summary: Completed testing of Email Notification System for Clock Rules and Overtime Authorizations. All backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend authorization page fixed (ESLint error) and fully functional.

tests: POST /api/notifications/check-clock-in - Returns list of users notified (status: completed/skipped)
POST /api/notifications/check-clock-out - Returns list of users with active clock
Both endpoints require admin authentication (401/403 for unauthenticated)
GET /api/overtime/authorization/{token} - Returns authorization details for valid token
GET /api/overtime/authorization/{token} - Returns 404 for invalid token
POST /api/overtime/authorization/{token}/decide - Requires admin authentication
GET /api/overtime/authorizations - Lists all authorizations (admin only)
GET /api/overtime/authorizations?status=pending - Filters by status correctly
GET /api/notifications/logs - Returns notification logs
GET /api/notifications/logs?limit=10 - Respects limit parameter
Endpoint requires admin authentication
APScheduler configured for 09:30 (clock-in check) and 18:15 (clock-out check)
Scheduler running with Europe/Lisbon timezone
Jobs configured for weekdays only (mon-fri)
Page loads correctly with authorization details
Shows user name, date, time, and day type (Sábado)
Displays 'Consequências da Decisão' info box
Approve (Autorizar) and Reject (Não Autorizar) buttons visible
Invalid token shows error page with 'Pedido de autorização não encontrado'
Error page has 'Voltar ao Início' button

updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/OvertimeAuthorization.jsx - Fixed ESLint react-hooks/exhaustive-deps error by moving fetchAuthorization logic inside useEffect
seed_data_creation: Used existing authorization request in database with test token

notification_system.clock_in_check: Working - Sends emails to users without clock-in at 09:30
notification_system.clock_out_check: Working - Sends emails to users with active clock at 18:15
notification_system.manual_trigger: Working - Admin can manually trigger checks via API

overtime_authorization.get_details: Working - Returns authorization details by token
overtime_authorization.decide: Working - Admin can approve/reject via API
overtime_authorization.list_all: Working - Admin can list all authorizations with optional status filter

frontend_page.valid_token: Shows authorization form with user details and decision buttons
frontend_page.invalid_token: Shows error message with back button

context_for_next_testing_agent: Email notification system for clock rules is fully implemented and tested. APScheduler runs checks at 09:30 (clock-in) and 18:15 (clock-out) on weekdays. Authorization page at /authorize/:token allows admins to approve/reject overtime requests. Test token '-0CtNfku7oiZFjlTfUTNsJKdK4nZR53HfjiWyFLHX90' is available for testing. SMTP emails are real (not mocked) via Outlook SMTP.
